topic: The door to my childhood bedroom is a wall now but I still hear the knob turn
title: The Door to My Childhood Bedroom Is a Wall Now. I Still Hear the Knob Turn. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The door to my childhood bedroom is gone. Smooth wall where it was. I still hear the knob turn at night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smooth painted wall in an upstairs hallway where a door once was, a faint outline visible, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought my childhood home back this spring. The new owners had renovated everything.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a modest two story suburban house in spring daylight, an empty front yard, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My old room was upstairs, second on the left.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an upstairs hallway with several closed doors, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Second on the left is flat wall now. Painted over. No frame, no hinges.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a flat painted wall section with no door, a faint rectangular seam under the paint, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a fist knocking against a smooth wall, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the hallway is too short by one room.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a short upstairs hallway with one fewer door than expected, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of an old house blueprint unrolled on a table, a bedroom marked, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The room is there on paper. Behind the wall.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a blueprint detail showing a bedroom behind a hallway wall, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At night I hear a doorknob turn where no door is. Then small footsteps inside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a blank hallway wall at night, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night a child's voice asked through the wall why I locked the door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person standing before a blank hallway wall at night, only a silhouette, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not slept upstairs since.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person asleep on a downstairs couch, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There are crayon marks appearing low on that wall. From the other side.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of faint crayon scribbles appearing low on a painted hallway wall, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
